productName: Torus Infused Pre-roll Hashbreak Pancake Syrup 1g
description: A hybrid pre-roll of Pancake Syrup supercharged with concentrate — packed with flower and boosted inside, outside, or both for a stronger, slower-burning smoke. More potent than flower alone, with more intense effects — a sweet, vanilla, earthy aroma with a relaxing, euphoric feel, delivering a balanced head-and-body experience. Pace yourself.
